items.acceptance: A supported shadow candidate reaches one deterministic paper decision without importing legacy senders.
items.title: Wire the PR-148 exact candidate kernel into the supported composition root

items.acceptance: Every candidate records provider request, response, expiry, route identity and exact second-leg output evidence.
items.title: Finish exact second-leg route finalization

items.acceptance: The supported paper path produces canonical unsigned v0 bytes with exact payer, blockhash and validated lookup tables.
items.title: Connect canonical compiler and ALT validation

items.acceptance: Paper execution stores final-message simulation, compute units, logs and exact CPI call-graph evidence.
items.title: Connect exact composed simulation and CPI proof

items.acceptance: Candidate, reservation, compile, simulation, rejection and settlement states are durable and idempotent across restart.
items.title: Use one durable lifecycle state machine

items.acceptance: No paper success is reported until actual finalized balances, fees and repayment evidence are reconciled.
items.title: Connect finalized economic settlement reconciliation

items.acceptance: Duplicate logical opportunities and restarted workers cannot repeat the same candidate or consume capital twice.
items.title: Make deduplication and cooldown durable

items.acceptance: Every candidate has deterministic gross/net PnL, cost ledger, rejection code, latency and provenance metrics.
items.title: Publish paper PnL and rejection attribution

items.acceptance: Management uses api-mainnet.helius-rpc.com, canonical webhookID, bounded responses, public HTTPS and authHeader.
items.title: Replace stale Helius management contract

items.acceptance: Delivery auth, replay window, duplicate event keys and durable acknowledgement are active in the supported runtime.
items.title: Connect authenticated and idempotent Helius delivery ingestion

items.acceptance: JSON-RPC methods, regional endpoints, bundle limits, rate limits, tip policy and status semantics match official Jito behavior.
items.title: Replace quarantined Jito client with one canonical sender adapter

items.acceptance: Ambiguous acceptance never causes shotgun resubmission and bundle status never becomes economic success.
items.title: Enforce Jito retry and unbundling policy

items.acceptance: Credentialed fixtures prove GET /swap/v2/build schema, instruction buckets, ALT mappings, expiry and account-wide quota behavior.
items.title: Continuously verify Jupiter Swap V2 build contract

items.acceptance: Pinned program, group, IDL, discriminator, account owner, complete state and flash-loan instruction bytes match deployed evidence.
items.title: Attest deployed MarginFi account and instruction contracts

items.acceptance: Pinned KLend program/IDL/account decoders pass credentialed mainnet read-only conformance before any execution work.
items.title: Promote Kamino from fixtures to verified read-only state

items.acceptance: Mint owner, extensions, withheld fees, transfer hooks and LST policy are included in exact sizing and settlement.
items.title: Complete Token-2022 and LST transfer-fee economics

items.acceptance: Program owners, executable flags, deployed hashes, ALT authority/deactivation and account metas are revalidated at finalization.
items.title: Verify every executable program and ALT

items.acceptance: Critical blockhash, account, simulation and settlement reads use bounded independent RPC quorum with minContextSlot.
items.title: Use rooted independent RPC evidence quorum

items.acceptance: All durable states use optimistic concurrency, immutable evidence hashes and crash-safe replay.
items.title: Persist lifecycle transitions in one transactional store

items.acceptance: Available capital excludes fees, rent, tips, ATA/wSOL costs and concurrent reservations at every decision boundary.
items.title: Make capital reservations authoritative

items.acceptance: Submission intent, provider calls and acknowledgements are durable before I/O and recover deterministically after crash.
items.title: Add outbox/WAL for external side effects

items.acceptance: No active runtime loads raw private keys; signer policy, scope, rotation and revocation are independently enforced.
items.title: Move signer material behind isolated authorization

items.acceptance: Every run has trace IDs, bounded-cardinality metrics, sanitized errors and durable evidence links.
items.title: Connect structured metrics, traces and redacted evidence

items.acceptance: Provider freshness, RPC divergence, queue lag, reservation leakage and reconciliation latency page operators before unsafe execution.
items.title: Define SLOs and alerting for stale or degraded dependencies

items.acceptance: Non-root runtime, read-only filesystem, egress allowlist, resource limits and fail-closed secrets pass deployment validation.
items.title: Finish hermetic production sandbox

items.acceptance: Locked dependencies, SBOM, provenance, signatures and vulnerability exceptions are reproducible and reviewed.
items.title: Seal supply-chain artifacts and dependency policy

items.acceptance: RPC/provider outage, leaked key, stuck reservation, ambiguous submission and bad deployment have tested rollback procedures.
items.title: Create operator incident and credential runbooks

items.acceptance: Clock jumps, 429/5xx, partial JSON, RPC forks, dropped websockets, crashes and duplicated webhooks preserve invariants.
items.title: Run deterministic failure and chaos suites

items.acceptance: A pinned build completes 72 hours with no lifecycle corruption, reservation leakage or unclassified fatal errors.
items.title: Run a real 72-hour paper/shadow soak

items.acceptance: Provider schemas, program binaries, IDLs, addresses and dependency pins are checked on schedule and before release.
items.title: Schedule external and on-chain drift verification

items.acceptance: All paper and canary gates reference immutable reviewed artifacts from the exact git SHA and configuration hash.
items.title: Seal one reviewable evidence bundle

items.acceptance: Known opportunities, rejection paths and settlement outcomes replay identically after every dependency or provider change.
items.title: Keep deterministic replay and regression baselines

items.acceptance: Canary has immutable wallet, notional, daily loss, route, provider and transaction-count caps with automatic shutdown.
items.title: Implement hard limited-canary caps

items.acceptance: A reviewed evidence hash and time-bounded operator acknowledgement are required before each canary activation.
items.title: Require explicit operator acknowledgement

items.acceptance: Every submitted signature reaches reconciled success, reconciled failure or manual review without silent loss.
items.title: Prove finalized post-trade reconciliation in canary

items.acceptance: Canary shutdown, signer revocation, reservation recovery and state export are tested before any scale increase.
items.title: Exercise rollback and kill-switch recovery

epics.title: Measured soak, evidence and limited canary

purpose: Consolidate remaining production debt into four large vertical PRs while keeping all execution fail closed.
